description: This 3D model showcases a collection of neatly folded bedding items, suggesting a cozy and inviting bedroom setting. The arrangement includes a pink blanket with a subtle, repeating pattern of stylized waves or scales, a folded duvet with a classic navy and white stripe pattern, and two light blue pillows, one with a faint white dot pattern and the other with a more abstract, textured design. The overall presentation evokes a sense of comfort, cleanliness, and curated style, perfect for creating a relaxing atmosphere. The textures and folds are rendered with a soft, inviting appearance, making the bedding look soft and comfortable.
